abilities.name: Fellow Boost
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach a basic Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokemon that has Latias or Latios in its name. If you do, your turn ends.

attacks.name: Mist Ball
attacks.text: Discard a Fire Energy and a Water Energy attached to Latias ex.

tests.name: fellow_boost_ends_turn
tests.description: Test Fellow Boost ends turn after attaching energy
